content.full_text:
October 26, 1990

Ms. Linda Cassidy
Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance Division
PO Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

This letter will confirm the telephone advice you dispensed to me on October 25, 1990.

In response to my inquiry, you opined that a general purpose recipient committee may maintain two separate accounts for candidate contributions and ballot measure activities, respectively. The general recipient committee may use both accounts to finance the cost of a single mailer to voters advocating support both of certain ballot measures and aid of local candidates who are subject to valid local contribution limits and ratably allocate the cost of the mailer to the two separate accounts.

If I have inaccurately characterized your advice in any respect, please contact me immediately. Thank you again for your assistance in this matter.

Very truly yours,

Edward J. Weiss
Manatt, Phelps & Phillips

EJW/kw
